column1: #mapping_set_title: IBM AI Capabilities to OECD AI Capability Indicators Mapping
#mapping_set_description: Semantic mappings between IBM AI Capabilities Framework and OECD AI Capability Indicators. OECD framework measures capabilities across nine domains.

column9: Reading comprehension is part of OECD's broader Language domain
Contextual understanding falls under OECD Language domain (Learning through language)
Text generation relates to OECD Communication capability
Logical reasoning is a component of problem solving
Causal reasoning is a component of problem solving
Math reasoning is a component of problem solving
Domain knowledge relates to OECD Knowledge representation subdomain
Common sense relates to OECD Reasoning about knowledge subdomain
Factual accuracy is a component of trustworthy AI systems
Code generation relates to OECD's creativity domain
Code understanding involves comprehension, part of Language domain
